embeds.title: Nocom
embeds.description:
Nocom was an exploit used by Nerds Inc from 2018 to 2021. Considered to be the most severe exploit in 2b2t history, it began when a server lagging/crashing exploit was patched in PaperMC, a Minecraft server software used on 2b2t. The exploit allowed Nerds Inc to observe the player movements of every player on 2b2t.
The initial exploit allowed a ...
